settings.code_eyebrow: Your code - 22% off everything plus Free UK +Ireland Shipping

settings.headline: 'It's in the roots that we inherit...'
settings.lead:
From one family of Arsenal fans to another, here's our Arsenal Edit, full of colour, joy, and pieces that feel nearly as good as our boys winning with such magic. These aren't AFC branded pieces, because it's not always feasible to put Arsenal into your everyday work + social life; rather these are Arsenal-red happy pieces to wear your deep Arsenal joy everywhere in your life, from work to parties,  barbeques to the Emirates. Made by fantastic Spanish family company Joidart. 

From The Thornhill to The Hemmy, here is your Arsenal-red collection - fogging enjoy.
settings.products_eyebrow: The Arsenal Edit  - Take 22% off all prices + Free Ireland and UK Shipping
settings.code_eyebrow: Your code - 22% off everything plus Free UK +Ireland Shipping
settings.note_quote: We did this in such style because Mikel made us all 100% BELIEVE in ways we didn't know possible. So much love for this incredible team + for all the behind the scenes people who made it happen, from the kitchen staff who fed our boys so well, to the cleaners who made everything function; to Arsenal Women who showed the way; the back-room team +  great grounds-people + the stadium team who made Emirates feel like home very minute we were there. We love you all. Thank you.

settings.heading: Be the first to know about the Arsenal Collection and get special Arsenal-fan-only discounts + offers!
